response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched the reference JSON. However, there were critical lyric deviations where the burnt-in floating text and vocals diverged from the reference (e.g., '不甲斐ない' instead of '狂いない', '委ねて' instead of '揺らして', '貴方' instead of '君').
2. JSON Usage: Fully corrected the reference text to match the actual vocals and floating text shown on screen. Silent panels during the narrative comic segment (01:10 - 02:51) were left unsubtitled as they contained no vocals or translatable text.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the vocal cues using aggressive truncation where transitions are fast to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Bearing through the pain, I try to be brave
subtitles.english: Bearing through the pain, I try to be brave

subtitles.original: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay. I'm not gonna bend, ha!
subtitles.english: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay. I'm not gonna bend, ha!

subtitles.original: I can be a cure for peace in your heart, and I'll play as a nurse healing you every day
subtitles.english: I can be a cure for peace in your heart, and I'll play as a nurse healing you every day

subtitles.original: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches, all in a cute band-aid
subtitles.english: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches, all in a cute band-aid

subtitles.original: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side 'til I see your smile beam bright again
subtitles.english: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side 'til I see your smile beam bright again

subtitles.original: うりゃ おい！ うりゃ おい！ う～ ファイター！ スーパーパワフルミクちゃーん！
subtitles.english: Urya oi! Urya oi! Oooo fighter! Super powerful Miku-chan!

subtitles.original: うりゃ おい！ うりゃ おい！ う～ サイバー！ ミク ミク ミク go !
subtitles.english: Urya oi! Urya oi! Oooo cyber! Miku miku miku go!

subtitles.original: あぁ、眠いよ～
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm sleepy...

subtitles.original: あっ！
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: 夢だった？！
subtitles.english: It was a dream?!

subtitles.original: 知った。
subtitles.english: I knew.

subtitles.original: 救いのない形だった僕の声は
subtitles.english: My voice was of a helpless form

subtitles.original: 知った。
subtitles.english: I knew.

subtitles.original: 狂いのない赤い血が流れているんだ<
subtitles.english: Flawless red blood is flowing

subtitles.original: ただただ襲い来る影ばかり
subtitles.english: Only the shadows constantly assailing me

subtitles.original: 目背けて抗う言葉立ち上がれないよ風
subtitles.english: Turning away, resisting words, the wind won't let me stand

subtitles.original: 赤く光る場所へ裸足で駆け出したら
subtitles.english: Running barefoot toward the place shining red

subtitles.original: ただ膝を抱えている君がいた
subtitles.english: You were there, just holding your knees

subtitles.original: だからEncount! 悲劇ぶった天国へ
subtitles.english: So, Encount! To a heaven acting like a tragedy

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ない瞳きっとあの日見つめた君のせいだ
subtitles.english: My pathetic eyes, surely it's because of you who stared back that day

subtitles.original: 早く、早く、早く、早く
subtitles.english: Faster, faster, faster, faster

subtitles.original: 早く、早く、早く、早く身を委ねて
subtitles.english: Faster, faster, faster, faster, surrender your body

subtitles.original: 淡い、淡い、水面の向こうへと
subtitles.english: To the other side of the faint, faint water surface

subtitles.original: 知った。
subtitles.english: I knew.

subtitles.original: 救いのない熱を持った僕の炎夏
subtitles.english: My midsummer heat held a helpless warmth

subtitles.original: 知った。
subtitles.english: I knew.

subtitles.original: 狂いのない貴方の目は醜かった
subtitles.english: Your flawless eyes were hideous

subtitles.original: 酷く、酷く、酷く、酷く
subtitles.english: Terribly, terribly, terribly, terribly

subtitles.original: 酷く、酷く、酷く、酷く
subtitles.english: Terribly, terribly, terribly, terribly

subtitles.original: 酷く、酷く、酷く、酷く...
subtitles.english: Terribly, terribly, terribly, terribly...

subtitles.original: 呆然としてるその顔に触れてみたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to try touching that dumbfounded face

subtitles.original: だからEncount! 喜劇ぶった天国へ
subtitles.english: So, Encount! To a heaven acting like a comedy
